overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Wallet value in USD (reference rates), token balances, and shortcuts to send funds or open drawings.
overview.p2pSub: Send to email or username. Network fees may apply.
overview.drawingsSub: View open pools when they are published on the platform.

wallet.title: Balances & deposits
wallet.subtitle: Balances load from your custodial wallet (one row per token). Deposits and ledger history will tie in here as payments go live.
wallet.depositMethodsSub: How you can add funds when each channel is enabled for your account.
wallet.recentLedgerSub: Ledger: deposits, transfers, fees, and admin adjustments · filter by token or view all

deposit.title: Deposit Funds
deposit.subtitle: Add funds via PayPal, crypto (BTC / ETH / SOL), or card.
deposit.paymentMethodSub: Choose how you want to deposit
deposit.selectCryptoSub: Choose the network you will send from
deposit.enterAmountSub: How much do you want to deposit?
deposit.yourRequestsSub: Track your crypto and PayPal deposits by status and payment method.
deposit.enterAmountProof: Enter amount and payment proof after sending crypto
deposit.paymentSuccessStripe: Stripe payment approved. USD credited to your wallet.
deposit.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
deposit.paymentReceivedNote: Payment received. Approval may take a little longer.
deposit.paymentReceivedRefresh: Payment received. Approval may take a little longer; please refresh history shortly.
deposit.cryptoContinueHint: After sending crypto, continue to enter amount and payment proof (hash or screenshot).
deposit.stripePaymentDesc: Complete your payment with a secure card form using Stripe.
deposit.stripeSuccessDetail: Stripe payment approved and webhook confirmed. USD has been credited to your wallet.
deposit.emptyRequestsHint: Try changing filters or submit a new deposit request to see it here.
deposit.proofRequired: Enter transaction ID/hash or upload a payment screenshot.
deposit.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to make a deposit.
deposit.requestSubmittedMsg: Deposit request submitted. Admin will review shortly.
deposit.depositFailed: Failed to process deposit. Please try again.
deposit.stripe3dsHint: 3D Secure is handled automatically by your bank during payment authentication.

buy.title: Buy Tokens
buy.subtitle: Use your USD balance to buy platform tokens at fixed exchange rates.
buy.selectTokenSub: Choose which platform token you want to buy
buy.amountUsdSub: Enter how much USD you want to spend
buy.balanceNote: You need sufficient USD balance to buy any token. The button will be enabled when your USD amount is within your available USD balance.
buy.insufficientUsd: Insufficient USD balance to buy {symbol}. You have {balance} available.
buy.step1Desc: Choose which platform token you want to buy
buy.step2Desc: Specify how much USD you want to spend
buy.step3Desc: Review the token amount and confirm transaction
buy.step4Desc: Tokens are added to your wallet instantly
buy.bulletSelectToken: Select a token from the list

history.title: Transaction history
history.subtitle: Your ledger: deposits, withdrawals, transfers, fees, and platform credits or debits. Filter by token or view everything in one place.
history.allTransactionsSub: Newest first · same data as your wallet page, with more rows and filters.
history.noActivitySub: Ledger lines appear when your wallet has deposits, transfers, fees, or admin adjustments.
history.noActivityBody: Once movement is recorded on your account, it will show up here with date, type, and amount.

transfer.title: Transfer
transfer.subtitle: Send tokens to another user by email. Fees follow the schedule below; members on a plan with waived transfer fees pay no platform transfer fee.
transfer.feeWaived: Your membership plan includes waived transfer fees.
transfer.feeApplies: Transfer fee applies as configured by platform settings.
transfer.sendTokensSub: Choose recipient, asset, and amount — review before confirming.
transfer.irreversibleWarning: Transfers are irreversible once submitted. Double-check the recipient and token before confirming.
transfer.feeWaivedNote: Transfer fee waived by your membership plan.
transfer.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
transfer.couldNotVerifyRecipient: Could not verify recipient right now.
transfer.completeForm: Please complete recipient, token, and amount.

drawings.title: Drawings
drawings.subtitle: Live drawings published by superadmin are listed here.
drawings.activeDrawingsSub: Open pools you can join, plus drawings you participated in that have finished.
drawings.activeDrawingsEmptySub: Drawings set to {allUsers} appear here for every member, even without VIP. VIP-only pools require VIP status and VIP drawings on your plan.
drawings.winnerBanner: You were selected for this drawing. Open details for full information.
drawings.deductionHistoryNote: This deduction will be added to your transaction history.
drawings.recentWinnersSub: Latest completed drawings and who won each pool.
drawings.noWinnersYet: No winners announced yet. Completed drawings with a selected winner will appear here.
drawings.joinModalHint: Joining this drawing will deduct entry cost from your wallet.
drawings.capacityFull: Drawing capacity is full. Join is closed.

errors.networkJoinInfo: Network error while loading join info.

membership.title: Membership
membership.subtitle: Plans configured on the platform. When your account is assigned a tier, it is highlighted below.
membership.noTiersSub: When the team publishes tiers, they will show here with benefits and minimum balance in USD.
membership.vipBenefitsHint: Your tier is active. VIP benefits (waived fees, drawings, executive events) unlock when your portfolio reaches the next membership level and your account is marked VIP.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Official notices: title, type, audience, event date, and message — as published by admins.
announcements.noAnnouncementsSub: When admins publish community updates, they will appear here.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Submit a request with a subject and details. Track status and read replies from the platform team.
support.newTicketSub: Subject and details are sent to the admin team
support.yourTicketsSub: Select a ticket to read the thread and admin replies
support.priorityRequiredSub: Upgrade your membership to open tickets
support.priorityRequiredBody: Your plan must include Priority support and VIP status before you can send tickets. View membership tiers to see what is included.
support.subject: Subject
support.submitSuccess: Your ticket was submitted. Our team will respond here.
support.noTicketsSub: Submit a new ticket when you need help from the platform team.
support.awaitingReply: Awaiting reply from the platform team.
support.awaitingReplyDetail: You will see the admin reply here when available.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your identity, contact preferences, and security — synced with your account.
profile.updateProfileSub: Name, phone, country, and timezone are saved to your account.
profile.verificationSub: Identity checks for higher limits when KYC is required.
profile.securitySub: Change your password with your current password.
profile.passwordMinLength: Use at least 8 characters for the new password.
profile.emailChangeHint: Sign-in email — contact support to change.
profile.kycHint: When KYC goes live, verified members unlock higher limits and faster withdrawals.
profile.avatarUploadHint: Click photo to upload — JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 2MB.
profile.passwordChangeHint: Enter your current password, then choose a new one (at least 8 characters).

paypal.cancelledRetry: Payment cancelled. You can try again.
paypal.notConfiguredDev: PayPal is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID, then restart npm run dev.
paypal.notConfiguredServer: PayPal is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID on the server.
paypal.sdkError: Could not load PayPal. Refresh and try again.
paypal.sdkLoadHint: Check your connection and refresh the page. If this continues, use Pay with PayPal account below.
paypal.confirmingPayment: Confirming payment and crediting USD to your wallet…
paypal.creditingWallet: Payment authorized. Crediting USD to your wallet…
paypal.securingWallet: Payment authorized. Securing funds to your wallet…
paypal.verifying3ds: Checking your card — your bank may ask you to verify (3D Secure)…
paypal.sessionExpired: Payment session expired. Click "Start new payment attempt" and try again.
paypal.orderIdMissing: PayPal did not return an order id.
paypal.orderNotReady: PayPal order is not ready. Please try again.
paypal.loginCancelled: PayPal login cancelled. You can try again.
paypal.cancelled3ds: Bank verification (3D Secure) was cancelled. Your card was not charged. You can try again.
paypal.captureFailedWallet: Payment was approved but crediting your wallet failed. Please contact support if USD does not appear.
paypal.cardFieldsLoadError: Card fields could not load. You can still try entering your card or use Pay with PayPal account below.
paypal.cardSubmitError: Card payment could not be submitted. Check your card number, expiry, and CVV, then try again.
paypal.cardDeclinedSandbox: Card payment was declined. Sandbox test card: {card}, exp {expiry}, CVV {cvc}.
paypal.cardSubmitFailed: Could not submit card payment. Check card number, expiry, and CVV.
paypal.checkoutFailed: PayPal checkout failed. Please try again.
paypal.paymentNotCompleted: PayPal payment could not be completed. Please try again.
paypal.cardFormFailed: PayPal card form failed to load. Enable Advanced Card Payments on your PayPal app.
paypal.cardSubmitSandbox: Card payment could not be submitted. Check sandbox test card or PayPal app settings.
paypal.cardFailedSandbox: Card payment failed. Sandbox: Visa {card}, exp {expiry}, CVV {cvc}.
paypal.sandboxTestCard: Sandbox test card (copy exactly): {card} · Exp {expiry} · CVV {cvc}

crypto.proofOr: Fill transaction hash or upload screenshot (one required)
crypto.hashOrScreenshotRequired: Enter a transaction hash or upload a screenshot to submit your request.
crypto.pendingUntilApproved: Your request will appear as pending until admin approves it.
